title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Siemens India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Siemens India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Siemens India Ventures Solutions in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens India Ventures Solutions:
Siemens India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
